response.overview: Age of Quorum is a thrilling drama about Issy, a young British Black man, whose NYE celebrations turn terrifying when his friends break out some recreational drugs. He spirals into a paranoid nightmare where he’s confronted then stalked by a thug intent on violence, feeling there is no escape or safe place to weather this storm. His friends have abandoned him, then turn out to be part of the torture – before he’s released from his nightmare and back at the start of the evening.
response.tagline: A young man's New Year's Eve goes dramatically downhill when he's separated from his friends, and the night becomes an opponent in a fight he must win to survive."
response.title: Age of Quorum
